title: Conduct environment and food safety risk assessment of plant nutrition and soil fertility programs
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct environment and food safety risk assessment of plant nutrition and soil fertility programs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Maintain currency of environment and food safety information relating to fertilisers and soil ameliorants

pcs.text: Research and document community, government and agricultural industry concerns and legislative requirements relevant to fertiliser and soil ameliorant environmental stewardship, and define initiatives to address them
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and document community, government and agricultural industry concerns and legislative requirements relevant to fertiliser and soil ameliorant environmental stewardship, and define initiatives to address them?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and document community, government and agricultural industry concerns and legislative requirements relevant to fertiliser and soil ameliorant environmental stewardship, and define initiatives to address them.

pcs.text: Communicate with local organisations to identify and document local information relevant to nutrient management, particularly in a catchment or regional context
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate with local organisations to identify and document local information relevant to nutrient management, particularly in a catchment or regional context?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with local organisations to identify and document local information relevant to nutrient management, particularly in a catchment or regional context.

pcs.text: Research and document national and local information and standards relevant to food safety associated with fertiliser and soil ameliorant use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and document national and local information and standards relevant to food safety associated with fertiliser and soil ameliorant use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and document national and local information and standards relevant to food safety associated with fertiliser and soil ameliorant use.

pcs.text: Research and document information and standards relevant to transporting, handling, storing and applying fertilisers and soil ameliorants
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and document information and standards relevant to transporting, handling, storing and applying fertilisers and soil ameliorants?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and document information and standards relevant to transporting, handling, storing and applying fertilisers and soil ameliorants.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Maintain currency of environment and food safety information relating to fertilisers and soil ameliorants

elements.title: Evaluate environmental risks and develop a plant nutrition and soil fertility management program

pcs.text: Identify and document environmentally significant features of fertiliser, soil ameliorants, soil, landscape and climate that are likely to influence environmental risks associated with plant nutrition and soil fertility programs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and document environmentally significant features of fertiliser, soil ameliorants, soil, landscape and climate that are likely to influence environmental risks associated with plant nutrition and soil fertility programs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document environmentally significant features of fertiliser, soil ameliorants, soil, landscape and climate that are likely to influence environmental risks associated with plant nutrition and soil fertility programs.

pcs.text: Identify and document agronomic and operational activities associated with fertiliser and soil ameliorant programs and associated environmental risk categories
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and document agronomic and operational activities associated with fertiliser and soil ameliorant programs and associated environmental risk categories?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document agronomic and operational activities associated with fertiliser and soil ameliorant programs and associated environmental risk categories.

pcs.text: Evaluate and prioritise environmental risks and impacts associated with agronomic and operational activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate and prioritise environmental risks and impacts associated with agronomic and operational activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate and prioritise environmental risks and impacts associated with agronomic and operational activities.

pcs.text: Identify and evaluate management options to address environmental risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and evaluate management options to address environmental risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and evaluate management options to address environmental risks.

pcs.text: Develop and document a plant nutrition and soil fertility management program, and present to the land owner or manager
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and document a plant nutrition and soil fertility management program, and present to the land owner or manager?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and document a plant nutrition and soil fertility management program, and present to the land owner or manager.

pcs.text: Advise client of management options to address environmental risks, and gain agreement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Advise client of management options to address environmental risks, and gain agreement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Advise client of management options to address environmental risks, and gain agreement.

pcs.text: Use nutrient management tools in conjunction with land owner or manager to monitor effectiveness of management decisions over time
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use nutrient management tools in conjunction with land owner or manager to monitor effectiveness of management decisions over time?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use nutrient management tools in conjunction with land owner or manager to monitor effectiveness of management decisions over time.

pcs.text: Identify opportunities to improve efficiency and effectiveness of plant nutrition and soil fertility program, including use of fertilisers and soil ameliorants, and modify operational and agronomic recommendations accordingly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify opportunities to improve efficiency and effectiveness of plant nutrition and soil fertility program, including use of fertilisers and soil ameliorants, and modify operational and agronomic recommendations accordingly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify opportunities to improve efficiency and effectiveness of plant nutrition and soil fertility program, including use of fertilisers and soil ameliorants, and modify operational and agronomic recommendations accordingly.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Evaluate environmental risks and develop a plant nutrition and soil fertility management program
